ocr_findings.jp_actual: OCR includes chapter intro paragraph, 'ここに注目して読もう!' bullets, syllabus citation URL, scope-position table.
ocr_findings.jp_expected: Per R6 design, chapter pages emit only a chapter entity with title + chapter_number. Body context is intentionally dropped.
ocr_findings.trace: ocr/page_473.md (≈30 lines) vs translated/page_473.json (1 chapter entity). Matches R6 spec.
